title: Japan Is Startled by Prime Minister’s Grueling Sleep Schedule
summary_full: Sanae Takaichi has said she gets just “zero to three hours” of sleep a night, prompting a debate in the country over work-life balance.
summary_public: Sanae Takaichi has said she gets just “zero to three hours” of sleep a night, prompting a debate in the country over work-life balance.
